FINDING: api/foo.py:10:BLOCKING
WHAT: missing null check on `response` before dereferencing
EVIDENCE: api/foo.py:10
IMPACT: AttributeError on malformed payload
OPTIONS:
1. add null guard
DIFF_LINE: api/foo.py:10
REACHABLE_PATH: request handler receives empty body
REJECTED_ALTERNATIVE: pydantic validation catches it earlier but not for this path
